title: Senior Fleet Manager at BigBasket Logistics

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at BigBasket Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with BigBasket Logistics! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Visakhapatnam team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About BigBasket Logistics:
BigBasket Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket Logistics!
